moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The greatest grass-court tennis tournament culminates this weekend with the Ladies' Singles Final on Saturday and the Gentlemen's Singles Final on Sunday.

angles.name: Anticipation for finals
angles.copy: Who lifts the trophy this weekend? The Wimbledon finals are here, bringing two weeks of epic tennis to a close.

angles.name: Saturday's Ladies' Final
angles.copy: All eyes on Centre Court tomorrow for the Ladies' Singles Final! Who are you backing for the win at Wimbledon?

angles.name: Sunday's Men's Final
angles.copy: It's the big one! The Gentlemen's Singles Final at Wimbledon wraps up the tournament on Sunday. Can the favourite hold their nerve?

moments.title: Genesis Scottish Open concludes
moments.blurb: The Genesis Scottish Open, a key event on the men's golf calendar, wraps up its final round this Sunday.

angles.name: Final day drama
angles.copy: It's all to play for at the Genesis Scottish Open this Sunday! Who will master the links and take home the title?

angles.name: Golfing in Scotland
angles.copy: World-class golf in Scotland this weekend. Perfect Sunday viewing as the Genesis Scottish Open concludes.

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off on Thursday at the iconic Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major golf starts
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's original major! The Open Championship begins next Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale ready
angles.copy: The legendary Royal Birkdale is prepped and ready to host The Open Championship from next Thursday. Fore!

moments.title: BBC Proms First Night
moments.blurb: The world's largest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, begins its 2026 season with the First Night at the Royal Albert Hall on Friday.

angles.name: Proms season kicks off
angles.copy: A highlight of the summer cultural calendar! The BBC Proms season officially opens its doors next Friday. Get ready for weeks of incredible music.

angles.name: First Night anticipation
angles.copy: The Royal Albert Hall will be buzzing next Friday for the First Night of the Proms. A truly iconic British event begins!

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May turns 79 on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock royalty birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Iconic guitarist
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's guitar work is legendary. Celebrating his 79th birthday this Sunday!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: The iconic singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, pop, country, and more, celebrates her 80th birthday on Monday, July 15th.

angles.name: Happy 80th to a legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on Monday! An absolute legend of music.

angles.name: Voice of a generation
angles.copy: From 'You're No Good' to 'Blue Bayou', Linda Ronstadt's voice defined eras. Celebrating her milestone 80th birthday this Monday!

moments.title: Martha Reeves' 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on Thursday, July 18th.

angles.name: Motown Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Dancing in the street to celebrate! Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves this Thursday. What's your favourite Vandellas track?

angles.name: Soul icon
angles.copy: A true Motown icon, Martha Reeves brought us 'Dancing in the Street' and so many more hits. Wishing her a very happy 85th on Thursday!

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead singer of The Byrds, known for his distinctive Rickenbacker sound, turns 84 on Monday, July 13th.

angles.name: Folk-rock pioneer's day
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds on Monday! What's your favourite Byrds classic?

angles.name: The Byrds icon
angles.copy: From 'Mr. Tambourine Man' to 'Turn! Turn! Turn!', Roger McGuinn shaped a generation. Celebrating his 84th birthday this Monday!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: The innovative drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday on Wednesday, July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to The Police's drumming powerhouse, Stewart Copeland, this Wednesday! What's your top Police track?

angles.name: Behind the beats
angles.copy: The unique sound of The Police owes so much to Stewart Copeland's incredible drumming. Wishing him a happy 74th this Wednesday!

moments.title: Richie Sambora's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and co-songwriter Richie Sambora turns 67 on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Rock star's birthday
angles.copy: Livin' on a prayer, and celebrating a birthday! Happy 67th to Richie Sambora this Saturday. What's your favourite Bon Jovi anthem?

angles.name: Bon Jovi guitar hero
angles.copy: Richie Sambora's riffs are iconic! Wishing the former Bon Jovi guitarist a very happy 67th birthday this Saturday.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: The acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Folk-pop birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Saturday! Which of her evocative songs is your favourite?

angles.name: Distinctive voice
angles.copy: From 'Luka' to 'Tom's Diner', Suzanne Vega's unique sound has captivated millions. Celebrating her 67th birthday this Saturday!

moments.title: Joe Satriani & Marky Ramone 70th Birthdays
moments.blurb: Instrumental rock guitar virtuoso Joe Satriani and punk drumming legend Marky Ramone (The Ramones) both turn 70 on Monday, July 15th.

angles.name: Rock legends hit 70
angles.copy: Double 70th birthday celebration this Monday for rock legends Joe Satriani and Marky Ramone! Two icons, two very different sounds.

angles.name: Guitar god & punk icon
angles.copy: From shredding solos to relentless punk beats, Joe Satriani and Marky Ramone have left their mark. Happy 70th to both this Monday!

moments.title: Olly Alexander's 35th Birthday
moments.blurb: The singer, songwriter, and actor Olly Alexander, known as the frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, turns 35 on Monday, July 15th.

angles.name: Pop star's special day
angles.copy: Happy 35th Birthday to the fabulous Olly Alexander on Monday! What's your favourite Years & Years track or Olly moment?

angles.name: Eurovision star celebrates
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to the Eurovision stage, Olly Alexander has done it all. Wishing him a very happy 35th this Monday!

moments.title: Fred again..'s 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The acclaimed electronic artist and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Dance music birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the brilliant Fred again.. this Sunday! What's your favourite track or set from the electronic sensation?

angles.name: Producer and artist
angles.copy: From producing huge hits to his own acclaimed albums, Fred again.. is a force in music. Celebrating his 33rd birthday on Sunday!

moments.title: Alessia Cara's 30th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for her soulful pop hits, turns 30 on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Pop star hits 30
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to the incredibly talented Alessia Cara this Saturday! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Singing into a new decade
angles.copy: From 'Here' to 'Scars to Your Beautiful', Alessia Cara has delivered some huge hits. Wishing her a happy 30th birthday this Saturday!

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK will begin their summer holidays towards the end of next week, marking the official start of the long break for students.

angles.name: Holiday countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Many schools break up for the summer holidays next week. Who's ready for some sun and fun?

angles.name: School's out!
angles.copy: Freedom! School's out for summer for many across the UK by the end of next week. What are your plans for the long break?
